subject: Marshal route: Slice B commit window only
body: Controller route: allow Nebulous Slice B commit window only. Torrid GO is in; Slice A landed and its claims are closed. Please watch for a short git:index/head claim, exact commit-queue intent, exact staged pathspecs, and no coordination residue or Slice A files in the Slice B commit. Exact Slice B paths: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/controller.ts; agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts.
